title: Evidence Pack Extras
description: Auditor-facing metadata that extends data/regulations.json for the 12 tier-1 evidence packs generated under Phase 4.2. Complements the clause-level mappings already carried in data/regulations.json with retention expectations, role matrices, authoritative guidance, common deficiencies, testing approach, reporting cadence, and penalty structure. Hand-authored; every URL must resolve to an official regulator or standards-body source and every retention figure must cite its legal basis.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of this data file; bumped on breaking-change to the schema itself.

lastUpdated.description: ISO-8601 date the file was last touched; update whenever regulators publish amendments.

schemaRef.description: Relative path to the JSON schema defining this document.

regulations.description: Map of regulation id to auditor-facing metadata.

id.description: Must match a framework id in data/regulations.json

version.description: Must match a version string on the framework id in data/regulations.json

summary.description: Plain-language regulation purpose, approximately one paragraph.

scope.description: Who must comply: entity types, thresholds, carve-outs.

territorialScope.description: Geographic applicability: where does the regime reach.

retention.description: Retention period with units (e.g. '6 years', 'Duration of contract + 6 years').

source.description: Legal basis: statute, clause, regulator guidance, or industry standard that establishes the retention obligation.

auditorQuestions.description: Questions an auditor or regulator would typically ask. Phrased imperatively: 'Produce...', 'Show...', 'Demonstrate...'.

roles.description: Governance roles defined by or relevant to the regulation.

commonEvidenceSources.description: Typical log / record sources an auditor requests.

organisation.description: Regulator or standards body that publishes the guidance.

commonDeficiencies.description: Typical audit findings reported in enforcement actions, certification-body reports, or regulator guidance.

testingApproach.description: How regulators and external auditors typically test compliance.

reportingCadence.description: Mandatory and typical attestation / report cycles.

penaltyStructure.description: Enforcement mechanisms and penalty severity. Cite the enabling statute or directive.
